checkpoint_alignment.conclusion: Checkpoint/model mismatch was resolved using a legacy-compatible Day 33 diffusion wrapper.

interpretation: After exact checkpoint alignment, the current diffusion midpoint/timestep denoising-error Sgen proxy does not meaningfully separate injected anomalies from normal records. The result is close to random across all tested timesteps.

decision_for_day35.recommended_use: Keep Sgen as a diagnostic auxiliary signal only.
decision_for_day35.recommended_scoring_strategy: Use ontology score Sont and detector/supervised anomaly score as the dominant calibrated scoring signals. Assign Sgen a very small weight or exclude it until a stronger generative surprise definition is implemented.
